parents.subject: LU-18762 lnet: lst SIGSEGV in parser.c

commit.subject: LU-18620 tests: sanity_lfsck test 35 improvements
commit.message:
LU-18620 tests: sanity_lfsck test 35 improvements

Add checks for correctness of the ressurrected
agent entries. Also add a test for remote dir stripe.

Test-Parameters: fortestonly envdefinitions=ONLY=35,REPEAT=10     fstype=ldiskfs mdtcount=2 mdscount=2 testlist=sanity-lfsck
Signed-off-by: Alexander Zarochentsev <alexander.zarochentsev@hpe.com>
Change-Id: I48fac7264398a44cb4dac05eb260d7704db91d04
